query:
-- Summary by supplier
SELECT 
  s.supplierName,
  COUNT(*) as serviceCount,
  ROUND(SUM(s.monthlyCost - s.monthlyRevenue), 2) as totalMonthlyLoss,
  ROUND(AVG((s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / s.monthlyRevenue * 100), 1) as avgMarginPct
FROM services s
WHERE s.monthlyRevenue > 0 AND s.monthlyCost > 0
  AND (s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / s.monthlyRevenue * 100 < 0
GROUP BY s.supplierName
ORDER BY totalMonthlyLoss DESC;

FROM services s

ORDER BY totalMonthlyLoss DESC;
